creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update: the bug can be triggered more rapidly by this FSX command.  Note the seed value:

$ sudo fsx -vN 1000 -f ~/tmp/bfffs-on-nfs.toml -S10 /mnt/fsx.bin
